name: inspect-json-cli
description: Zero-dependency CLI for filtered pretty-printing of JSON-heavy AI logs (LLM requests, responses, JSONL).
author: Paul Kohler

scripts.check: node --check bin/*.mjs && node --check src/*.mjs && node --check test/*.mjs && node --check scripts/*.mjs && biome check .
scripts.format: biome format --write --vcs-enabled=true --vcs-use-ignore-file=true bin src test scripts
